Your Car.name: Your Car (In Transit)
Your Car.description: The engine idles quietly. The city lights blur past the glass. This car is the only thing keeping you ahead of the design. You have the names, and you have the clues—now you just have to choose where to intervene.

fight through police.locked_message: You can't bring yourself to ram the cruiser... yet.

Your Car._comment: The _setup_hub_exits function will inject 'drive to [Workplace]' and 'drive to Bludworth's' here.
